message:
fix: add marked to root deps and regenerate lock file

The npm-published agentdb@2.0.0-alpha.3.7 requires marked-terminal
which depends on marked. Without it in the lock file, npm ci fails
in test.yml CI workflows.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
